get.description: Find applications. It allows filtering. This service will return all applications if the user has ACTIVITI_DEVOPS role otherwise it returns only applications belonging to the user.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter on application name, showing all applications that contains the search key.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Application status

parameters.name: createdDateFrom
parameters.description: Date used as start interval in search by creation date. Allowed formats: yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSS.

parameters.name: createdDateTo
parameters.description: Date used as end interval in search by creation date. Allowed formats: yyyy-MM-dd or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss or yyyy-MM-ddTHH:mm:ss.SSS.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: Roles that user must have on the application.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Deployment environments' GUIDs

get.summary: Get subscribed app keys for the current account
Get mappings describing how subscription app keys relate to other entities
Filter all the releases of all released projects

parameters.name: projectName
parameters.description: The name of the project to filter releases.

parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: The id of the project to filter releases

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: The version of the project to filter releases.

parameters.name: createdDateFrom
parameters.description: The date used as start of the interval to filter by creation date. It searches always for the day, removing the time information.

parameters.name: createdDateTo
parameters.description: The date used as end of the interval to filter by creation date. It searches always for the day, removing the time information.

parameters.name: showAllVersions
parameters.description: Default value is false, and it returns only the latest versions. If it is true, it forces the service to return all versions. If a version parameter is specified, the service will returns only the specified version.

get.description: Fetch all users belonging to an application.

parameters.name: appName
parameters.description: ID of application

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Filter on username, showing all users that contains the search key

parameters.name: group
parameters.description: If the value is 'true' the service will return users belonging to the application, directly or via groups. Otherwise only users directly belonging to the application will be returned.

parameters.name: roles
parameters.description: Roles that user must have on the application.

parameters.name: excludeServiceClients
parameters.description: If the value is 'true' the service will return only users belonging to the application. Otherwise user and service clients belonging to the application will be returned.

parameters.name: environmentId
parameters.description: Deployment environment GUID

get.description: Fetch all groups belonging to an application.

parameters.description: Filter on group name, showing all groups that contains the search key

parameters.description: Roles that user must have on the application.

parameters.description: Deployment environment GUID
